body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** (Phase 9) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Language/Mantra to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Dangerous phase.** — Neuroinformatics. PMID: 16284414. DOI: 10.1385/NI:3:4:315. "Use aquiet reference." How many times have we heard this mantra during training or practice, interpreting electroencephalogram (EEG) tracings, or implanting intracranial electrodes? How many of us have used common reference EEG for synchrony studies in recent years? Far too many.Perhaps one source of this problem is the number 104. This is the relatively small number of citations to the reference Fein et al., which should have put to rest any further use of referential EEG for coherence
